div1.entryFree:
Favourable, 1) friendly, kind: unless some dull and f. hand will whisper music to my weary spirit, H4B IV, 5, 2 (cf. favouring hand, Ant. IV, 8, 23). lend f. ears to our request, R3 III, 7, 101.
2) propitious: f. stars, Shr. IV, 5, 40. till the heavens look with an aspect more f. Wint. II, 1, 107. most f. and happy speed, Oth. II, 1, 67.
